requirement_topic.en: Network Interoperability, OCPP Readiness, and IEC 61000 EMC
requirement_topic.zh: 联网互操作、OCPP准备度与IEC 61000 EMC
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網互操作、OCPP準備度與IEC 61000 EMC

summary.en: Uganda does not have an official public OCPP mandate confirmed for all EV chargers, but networked public, fleet, depot, or payment-enabled chargers should be prepared for open back-office interoperability where required by the buyer, charge-point operator, utility, or tender. EMC and power-quality evidence should be documented against the IEC 61000 family where IEC-based product evidence is requested. ERA and the relevant utility may review load, harmonic, protection, metering, and grid-impact information for larger connected chargers.
summary.zh: 目前未能确认乌干达对所有电动汽车充电桩已有官方公共OCPP强制要求；但公共、车队、场站或带支付功能的联网充电桩，在采购方、充电点运营商、电力公司或招标要求时，应具备开放后台互操作能力。若要求IEC体系产品证据，应按IEC 61000系列准备EMC和电能质量文件。ERA及相关电力公司可能对较大容量并网充电桩的负荷、谐波、保护、计量和电网影响信息进行审查。
summary.zht: 目前未能確認烏干達對所有電動汽車充電樁已有官方公共OCPP強制要求；但公共、車隊、場站或帶支付功能的聯網充電樁，在採購方、充電點運營商、電力公司或招標要求時，應具備開放後台互操作能力。若要求IEC體系產品證據，應按IEC 61000系列準備EMC和電能質量文件。ERA及相關電力公司可能對較大容量併網充電樁的負荷、諧波、保護、計量和電網影響信息進行審查。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers where specified
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
ERA electricity-sector regulation and utility connection review

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the battery management system. This CAN bus protocol is not an OCPP back-office protocol and is not a substitute for CCS2-related communication where IEC systems are required. China AC chargers may support operator-specific back-office protocols, but exported firmware, SIM, payment, data, and cybersecurity settings must be checked for Uganda project requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的通信协议。该CAN总线协议不是OCPP后台协议，也不能在要求IEC系统时替代CCS2相关通信。中国交流充电桩可能支持运营商特定后台协议，但出口固件、SIM、支付、数据和网络安全设置须按乌干达项目要求核查。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的通訊協議。該CAN總線協議不是OCPP後台協議，也不能在要求IEC系統時替代CCS2相關通訊。中國交流充電樁可能支持運營商特定後台協議，但出口固件、SIM、支付、數據和網絡安全設置須按烏干達項目要求核查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China EMC test evidence where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm whether the Uganda buyer or operator requires OCPP, which OCPP version and security profile apply, how remote monitoring and payments will be hosted, and whether the product has IEC 61000 EMC and harmonic evidence acceptable to the importer, UNBS PVoC agent, utility, and site owner. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and China-only cloud firmware should not be described as interoperable for IEC / CCS2 Uganda projects without firmware, protocol, and backend testing.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认乌干达采购方或运营商是否要求OCPP、适用的OCPP版本和安全配置、远程监控和支付后台部署方式，以及产品是否具备进口商、UNBS PVoC代理、电力公司和场地方可接受的IEC 61000 EMC及谐波证据。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信并使用中国国内云固件的充电桩，在未完成固件、协议和后台测试前，不应被描述为适用于乌干达IEC / CCS2项目的互操作产品。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認烏干達採購方或運營商是否要求OCPP、適用的OCPP版本和安全配置、遠程監控和支付後台部署方式，以及產品是否具備進口商、UNBS PVoC代理、電力公司和場地方可接受的IEC 61000 EMC及諧波證據。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊並使用中國國內雲固件的充電樁，在未完成固件、協議和後台測試前，不應被描述為適用於烏干達IEC / CCS2項目的互操作產品。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — OCPP is mandatory only where specified by buyer, operator, tender, or platform; EMC and power-quality evidence may be required under UNBS PVoC, importer, utility, or site-owner review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic DC charging communication protocol and does not substitute for OCPP back-office interoperability or IEC EMC evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not market China-only cloud firmware or GB/T 27930 DC communication as Uganda-ready network interoperability. Confirm OCPP requirements, backend hosting, cybersecurity, payment integration, IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and utility power-quality review for each project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国国内云固件或GB/T 27930直流通信宣传为已满足乌干达联网互操作要求。每个项目都应确认OCPP要求、后台部署、网络安全、支付集成、IEC 61000 EMC证据和电力公司电能质量审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國國內雲固件或GB/T 27930直流通訊宣傳為已滿足烏干達聯網互操作要求。每個項目都應確認OCPP要求、後台部署、網絡安全、支付集成、IEC 61000 EMC證據和電力公司電能質量審查。
